skills/ directory contains 8+ SKILL.md files: figma-use, figma-code-connect, figma-create-new-file, figma-generate-design, figma-generate-library, figma-generate-diagram, figma-use-figjam, figma-use-slides

license.evidence: Repo governed by Figma Developer Terms (https://www.figma.com/legal/developer-terms/). Skills are explicitly downloadable and usable by any agentic tool (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI). Skills are a free Beta feature. No standard OSS license file in root, but skills have permissive public reuse posture — downloadable ZIP, installable via plugin, explicitly designed for public agent use.
